clarification: The repository avifenesh/cairn-rs does not exist (returns 404). The actual project is avifenesh/cairn, written in Go. This research covers the real project.

sources.title: avifenesh/cairn - GitHub Repository (main page)
keyInsights: Personal agent OS - self-hosted, single binary, always-on
Go 1.25 with pure SQLite, no CGO
Three-layer agent architecture: Loop > Orchestrator > ReAct

sources.title: Cairn README.md
keyInsights: Signal Plane monitors 11+ sources with deduplication
Agent system runs three modes: talk/work/coding
Memory uses vector search with MMR re-ranking

sources.title: Cairn Contributing Guidelines
keyInsights: Go 1.25+ and Node.js 22+ with pnpm 9+ required

sources.title: Cairn Architecture Vision
keyInsights: Valkey primary+replica with AOF/RDB for cache

sources.title: Event Bus Design Document
keyInsights: Typed async pub/sub using Go generics
Handler panics caught without disrupting other subscribers
No built-in persistence - stores subscribe to events

sources.title: LLM Client Design Document
keyInsights: Thread-safe budget management with daily/weekly limits

sources.title: Tool System Design Document
keyInsights: Generic Define function for type-safe tool definitions
LATM lifecycle for user-created tools with human approval
First-match permission model with glob patterns

sources.title: Agent Core Design Document
keyInsights: ReAct loop with mode-dependent round limits (40/80/400)
Orchestrator: GATHER > DECIDE > EXECUTE with anti-hallucination
Session compaction at 150K tokens with checkpoints
Strategic engine with two-tier goal hierarchy

sources.title: Task Engine Design Document
keyInsights: Lease-based atomic claiming via SQLite UPDATE
7 task types: general, chat, coding, digest, triage, workflow, subagent
Worktree isolation for concurrent git operations

sources.title: Memory System Design Document
keyInsights: Hybrid search: 0.3x keyword + 0.7x vector with MMR re-ranking
Token-budgeted context assembly with hard rule reserves
Three embedder backends: Noop, OpenAI, Bedrock

sources.title: Signal Plane Design Document
keyInsights: 12 pollers: GitHub, GitHub PRs, Stack Overflow, Dev.to, npm, crates.io, Reddit, HN, Twitter/X, Gmail, Calendar, RSS
RawEvent to StoredEvent pipeline with deduplication
Webhook receivers with HMAC signature validation

sources.title: Plugin and Skills Design Document
keyInsights: Skill Gap Store tracks capability gaps
5 built-in plugins: logging, budget, quality, skill_hooks, magic_docs

sources.title: Server and Protocols Design Document
keyInsights: Layered auth: API token > Bearer > query > cookie

sources.title: Frontend Design Document
keyInsights: Optimistic mutations with offline queue (50 entries)
14 shadcn-svelte components with Geist design font

sources.title: Channel Adapters Design Document
keyInsights: Unified Channel interface: Start(), Send(), Close()
Telegram with voice (Whisper STT), forum topics, Stars payments
Discord slash commands, Slack Socket Mode

sources.title: Cairn Main Entry Point (source code)
keyInsights: Glide-MQ sidecar wiring with health probe
Dependency injection wiring of all subsystems

sources.title: Glide-MQ Client Implementation
keyInsights: Health probe every 10 seconds with atomic boolean
AddJob, QueueCounts, Get, Post, Delete methods
Graceful degradation: callers check Healthy() before use
10-second HTTP timeout, 500-char response truncation for logs

sources.title: Agent Mailbox Implementation
keyInsights: Dual-storage: Valkey primary with in-memory fallback
Chronological merge from both storage paths

sources.title: Go Module Dependencies
keyInsights: No direct Valkey/Redis Go client dependency - uses HTTP to sidecar
AWS Bedrock SDK for LLM and embeddings
Sandboxing: seccomp-bpf + landlock + goja JS engine

sources.title: Cairn Build System (Makefile)
keyInsights: make build for dev, make build-prod for embedded frontend
Tests with race detector and 5-minute timeout
Separate benchmarks for memory and agent packages
GoReleaser on tag push for cross-platform binaries

sources.title: avifenesh GitHub Repositories (61 total)
keyInsights: 61 repos including cairn, glide-mq ecosystem, valkey-skills, valkey forks
speedkey is the Rust NAPI Valkey client used by glide-mq

sources.title: avifenesh (Avi Fenesh) - GitHub Profile
keyInsights: System Software Engineer at AWS ElastiCache
Maintainer of Valkey GLIDE and GLIDE MQ

sources.title: glide-mq - High-performance Message Queue
keyInsights: 1 RTT per job via Valkey Server Functions (FCALL)
Rust NAPI bindings via speedkey/valkey-glide core
AI-native: cost tracking, token streaming, suspend/resume, fallback chains
Cairn uses this as optional sidecar for persistent inter-agent messaging

sources.title: speedkey - Rust NAPI Valkey Client
keyInsights: 200+ Valkey/Redis commands plus Search, JSON, Bloom modules
Temporary bridge until official valkey-glide NAPI client ships
API mirrors valkey-glide for migration compatibility
